---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed API / behavior

How should it work from the user's perspective? Show example commands if applicable.

```bash
# Example
cpin search "todo"
cpin export --json > notes.json
```

## Alternatives considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why is your proposal better?

## Additional context

Links, prior art, related issues, or anything else useful.
